arts.sum: A statement said: “ Leeds United midfielder and Bulgaria international Ilia Gruev sustained an injury to his right knee during the club’s Championship draw with Norwich City at Carrow Road on Tuesday, which saw him withdrawn in the 20th minute. arts.ttl: Leeds: Brenden Aaronson named in USMNT squad
arts.sum: Leeds United are in the midst of a midfield crisis at the moment with Ethan Ampadu and Ilia Gruev suffering knee injuries, and the international break won’t give Daniel Farke’s squad any respite as of yet. While Farke confirmed on Wednesday that the midfielder has suffered a knee injury, the results of his scan are yet to be revealed, casting doubt over his availability in the rest of 2024 like Ampadu.

arts.ttl: Sunderland chief can't hide admiration for Leeds United star ahead of heavyweight clash
arts.sum: “We know Leeds are a strong team ready for promotion I think, with many strengths, in possession, out of possession, counter-attacks, and they are well managed,” said Le Bris. Sunderland head coach Regis Le Bris is wary of the strengths Leeds United possess ahead of tomorrow's Championship clash at the Stadium of Light, insisting: "We need to respect every team.”
